items.title: The greatest ever to do it, and an absolute class act. Enjoyed getting to know LT in my Laker beat days (including a 2-hour car ride in which he had to sandwich himself into my tiny Honda; LT is tall!).
items.author: Howard Beck
items.body_excerpt:
The greatest ever to do it, and an absolute class act. Enjoyed getting to know LT in my Laker beat days (including a 2-hour car ride in which he had to sandwich himself into my tiny Honda; LT is tall!).

Will miss hearing that amazing voice in the background of broadcasts. Enjoy retirement, LT!

items.title: Knicks-Spurs was the most-watched NBA Finals in 28 years, averaging 20.6 million viewers per game on ABC and ESPN. The Knicks’ series-clinching win in Game 5 averaged 24.5 million viewers and peaked with 33 million viewers — marking the most-watched Game 5 in 28 years.

items.body_excerpt: Knicks-Spurs was the most-watched NBA Finals in 28 years, averaging 20.6 million viewers per game on ABC and ESPN. The Knicks’ series-clinching win in Game 5 averaged 24.5 million viewers and peaked with 33 million viewers — marking the most-watched Game 5 in 28 years.
